inline_comments.message: properties field for ToscaPolicy cannot use the same type ToscaProperty since typically properties here are just key-value pairs, instead of those fields used in policy type. So I changed it to Map<String, String>

According to the TOSCA specification, section 3.7.6.1, page 108, properties are a list of property assignments and not a list of key value pairs. I believe we have to follow the TOSCA specification here, and I have followed it as closely as I can. If what's coming in is incorrect, then we have to tell the source of the incorrect incoming data that what they are sending is not valid TOSCA. If they won't change then we'll have to translate whats coming in into valid TOSCA.
